content.problemStatement:
This problem has two subtasks worth 505050 points each.

You are given an integer NNN. You also have NNN empty sets S1,S2,‚Ä¶,SNS_1, S_2, \ldots, S_NS1‚Äč,S2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,SN‚Äč.

Consider all the arrays AAA of length NNN such that 0‚Č§Ai‚Č§10 \leq A_i \leq 10‚Č§Ai‚Äč‚Č§1 for each 1‚Č§i‚Č§N1 \leq i \leq N1‚Č§i‚Č§N (there are 2N2^N2N such arrays in total).

For each of these 2N2^N2N arrays, we compute an array BBB of length NNN where Bi=B_i =Bi‚Äč= length of longest non-decreasing subsequence for the prefix of length iii of array AAA. (For example: if N=5N = 5N=5 and A=[0,1,0,1,1]A = [0, 1, 0, 1, 1]A=[0,1,0,1,1], then B=[1,2,2,3,4]B = [1, 2, 2, 3, 4]B=[1,2,2,3,4].) Next we add the array BBB to the set SBNS_{B_N}SBN‚Äč‚Äč (For example, B=[1,2,2,3,4]B = [1, 2, 2, 3, 4]B=[1,2,2,3,4] would be added to S4S_4S4‚Äč).

Output the size of sets S1,S2,‚Ä¶,SNS_1, S_2, \ldots, S_NS1‚Äč,S2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,SN‚Äč as NNN space-separated integers. Since the size of the sets might be large, output the values modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.

Note that the SiS_iSi‚Äč are sets, and hence do not contain duplicate elements. Please look at the sample cases below for an explained example.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the NNN space separated integers, size of sets S1,S2,‚Ä¶,SNS_1, S_2, \ldots, S_NS1‚Äč,S2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,SN‚Äč, modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all tests won't exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.
The sum of NNN over all tests won't exceed 5‚čÖ1035 \cdot 10^35‚čÖ103.
